name: Small-scale Buy-side Entity indicator
description: Reports to indicate that the Reporting Entity is making the report as a Small-scale Buy-side Entity.
optionalityRules: Optionally reported in a Valuation report (page 152, paragraph 585).
Small-scale Buy-side Entity indicator may be optionally reported in a Collateral report (page 163, paragraph 656).
valueRules: If reported, the value is SSBS (page 152, paragraph 584, 588(b)).
If reported, the value is SSBS (page 164, paragraph 659(b)).
